rationale: Review 2's finding (public lemma in mismatched namespace, used only internally) is clearly correct against the diff, but is minor. Review 1's file-placement concern is contested — the module doc explicitly argues the group structure on Hom(H,A) IS the functor-of-points content — and its second finding (missing antipodeAlgHom) cannot be verified from the diff; acting on it could involve unnecessary restructuring. Neither resulting PR is clearly better.
